creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
Hi, Taoka-san,

> I fetched expect.tar.gz from  http://expect.nist.gov/.
> It mismatched one in files/md5.

Thanks!
I think expect has updated.
# expect distribution files does not contain version number...
# so we get such probrem ;-(
I'll check it. and make patch if needed.
